title: [P0] 디자인 시스템 CSS vars — 브랜드 컬러 인라인 스타일 교체
description:
Implementation packet for CSS-vars landing/system rollout.

Precondition (must exist first):
- MUS-1687 comment token: CEO_DECISION_MUS1687_FINAL: APPROVE

Engineer acceptance bundle (required for CTO G1):
1) changed-file list with purpose per file
2) direct code diff evidence for token replacement path
3) regression tests (added/updated) with raw pass output
4) proof that inline brand hex usage was replaced by approved variables in target scope
5) risk notes: trust boundary, race risk, and rollback note

CTO G1 protocol:
- G1 판단은 CTO가 직접 코드/테스트 증거를 읽고 수행
- 증거 불충분 시 즉시 G1: FAIL
- G1 PASS 이후 QA G2로 handoff
